caribbean.headline: Bimini Faces Strong Winds
caribbean.paragraph: Bimini is experiencing winds of up to 23 kt and wave heights of 4.1 ft, with a 63% chance of rain, while nearby Martinique is seeing much calmer conditions with winds of 11 kt. I expect these conditions to impact marine activities in the region, particularly around Bimini, but they do not meet the thresholds for any significant marine warnings at this time.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Winds Rise
mediterranean.paragraph: Lisbon is experiencing west-southwesterly winds of 17 kt and wave heights of 2.8 ft, with an 85% chance of rain. Venice, meanwhile, is seeing lighter conditions with winds of 11 kt, as a low-pressure system brings unsettled weather to the Western Mediterranean, particularly affecting Lisbon.
